ModMetaData.name: IceWorld: Feast or Famine
ModMetaData.author: binchcannon
ModMetaData.description:
Part of the IceWorld mod collection, which adds vanilla-friendly features to enhance the "always winter" gameplay experience.
Adds the following: - Overeating Mechanics - Overcooked Meals - Animal Food Bowls
Visit this mod on the Steam workshop for more details.
